ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported data */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was reported */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on this date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on this date */,
  "cumulative_confirmed" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of confirmed cases */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., state, province) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "_continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination data collection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where vaccinations occurred */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination per population */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the demographics belong to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases in that demographic group */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in this demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region's healthcare resources */,
  "hospital_beds" INTEGER /* Number of hospital beds available */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators available */,
  "available_hospital_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available hospital beds at the time of reporting */,
  "available_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available ICU beds at the time of reporting */,
  "available_ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators at the time of reporting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_capacity_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tests were conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where tests were performed */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases identified */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., PCR, rapid antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_methods" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment method */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment method */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., effective, ineffective, under investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the outbreak */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outbreak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outbreak */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases during the outbreak */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the outbreak */,
  "outbreak_source" TEXT /* Source of the outbreak (e.g., travel, community spread) */,
  "outbreak_status" TEXT /* Status of the outbreak (e.g., contained, ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts since last successful login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
